---
title: "sectioned_ell_from_ragged"
generated: true
description: "Build a [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned/SectionedELL.qmd) from ragged per-row neighbour lists."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.ell_sectioned`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:sectioned_ell_from_ragged -->
```python
sectioned_ell_from_ragged(values_per_row: Sequence[Num[Array, '...']], indices_per_row: Sequence[Int[Array, '...']], *, n_cols: int, identity: Any = 0.0, pad_index: int = 0, bucket_by: Optional[Callable[[int], int]] = None) -> SectionedELL
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:sectioned_ell_from_ragged -->
Build a [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned/SectionedELL.qmd) from ragged per-row neighbour lists.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:sectioned_ell_from_ragged -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `values_per_row` | `Sequence[Num[Array, '...']]` | — | — | Length-`m` sequences of 1-D arrays. `values_per_row[i]` and `indices_per_row[i]` must have the same length, equal to row `i`'s degree. |
| `indices_per_row` | `Sequence[Int[Array, '...']]` | — | — | Length-`m` sequences of 1-D arrays. `values_per_row[i]` and `indices_per_row[i]` must have the same length, equal to row `i`'s degree. |
| `n_cols` | `int` | — | — | Outer dim of the implicit sparse matrix. |
| `identity` | `Any` | — | `0.0` | Semiring identity used to pad rows within each bucket up to the bucket's `k_max`. |
| `pad_index` | `int` | — | `0` | Row of the dense operand that pad positions reference. Default `0`; must be `< n_cols`. |
| `bucket_by` | `Optional[Callable[[int], int]]` | — | `None` | Custom bucketing function `degree -> bucket_idx`. Defaults to `ceil(log2(max(degree, 1)))`. |

**Returns** `SectionedELL`. A [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned/SectionedELL.qmd) with one [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd) per non-empty bucket.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:sectioned_ell_from_ragged -->
::: {.callout-note}
Runs on the host (not JIT-compatible).  Construction is
typically done once per adjacency (e.g., once per mesh or once
per pre-computed k-NN graph); the resulting [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned/SectionedELL.qmd)
can then be passed through JIT'd code many times.
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
